name: inventory_nemotron_updated
command: python -c "from aho.council.inventory import inventory; m = inventory(); n = next((x for x in m if 'nemotron' in x.name.lower()), None); print(f'nemotron={n.status if n else None}')"
actual_output: nemotron=gap: classification logic silences errors and defaults to reviewer

name: removed_test_not_in_baseline
command: python -c "import json; b = json.load(open('artifacts/harness/test-baseline.json')); ids = [f['test_id'] for f in b['baseline_failures']]; assert 'test_trace_state_returns_last_20' not in ' '.join(ids); print('ok')"

name: no_new_baseline_regressions
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import baseline_regression_check, run_check; r = run_check(baseline_regression_check()); print('baseline-stable' if r.passed else r.actual_output)"
